Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Dated February 10, 2019 And Contest Pay Of Death Designation
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Denise Eaton-May appeared by telephone for Rickey Johnson (Petitioner).
Christopher Schweickert for Tracy Pleasant, Alfreda Washington, Robin Hockely and Robert Hockley.

The Court noted that there is a notice problem, that the petition has proof of service of a summons and that it needs proof of service of the notice of hearing. Mr. Schweickert stated that he waives notice on behalf of his Clients, that he believes other parties also waive notice, spoke of his Clients being beneficiaries of the bank account, stated that there are no injunctions and asked the Court to order the bank to release the funds to his Clients. Ms. Eaton-May stated that she objects to release of any of those funds and that there is an issue of capacity. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is continued to October 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Dated February 10, 2019 And Contest Pay Of Death Designation
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Denise Eaton-May for and with Rickey Johnson.
Christopher Schweickert for Tracy Pleasant, Alfreda Washington, Robin Hockley and Robert Hockley (Beneficiaries).

Mr. Schweickert is sworn in and under oath presents an oral 170.6 motion to disqualify Judge Busch from presiding over the matter. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust, etc. is continued to September 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard by Judge Quinn.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Reporter: Ken Brill, CSR #12797, 415-274-9977, sfdepo@veritext.com
